metadata.file_name: Duran Duran - The Wild Boys (Wilder Than Wild Boys Extended Mix).flac
metadata.title: The Wild Boys (Wilder Than Wild Boys Extended Mix)
metadata.lyrics:
[00:02.67] Wild boys, wild boys, wild boys
[00:08.12] Wild boys
[00:10.02] Wild! Boys!
[00:39.87] The wild boys are calling on their way back from the fire
[00:48.16] In August moon's surrender to a dust cloud on the rise
[00:56.24] Wild boys fallen far from glory, reckless and so hungered
[01:04.46] On the razors edge you trail because there's murder
[01:09.81] By the roadside in a sore afraid new world
[01:18.16] They tried to break us, looks like they'll try again
[01:25.38] Wild boys never lose it
[01:28.96] Wild boys never chose this way
[01:33.65] Wild boys never close your eyes
[01:38.13] Wild boys always shine
[01:49.94] You got sirens for a welcome, there's bloodstain for your pain
[01:58.00] And your telephone been ringing while you're dancing in the rain
[02:07.18] Wild boys wonder where is glory where is all you angels
[02:14.34] Now the figureheads have fell
[02:18.89] And lovers war with arrows over secrets they could tell
[02:27.94] They tried to tame you, looks like they'll try again
[02:36.08] Wild boys never lose it
[02:39.61] Wild boys never chose this way
[02:44.36] Wild boys never close your eyes
[02:47.95] Wild boys always shine
[03:07.96] Wild boys, wild boys, wild boys
[03:13.32] Wild boys, wild boys, wild boys
[03:34.15] Wild boys never lose it
[03:37.83] Wild boys never chose this way
[03:42.32] Wild boys never close your eyes
[03:46.84] Wild boys always
[03:50.40] Wild boys never lose it
[03:54.10] Wild boys never chose this way
[03:58.61] Wild boys never close your eyes
[04:03.22] Wild boys always
[06:15.33] Wild boys never lose it
[06:17.39] Wild boys never chose this way
[06:22.08] Wild boys never close your eyes
[06:26.67] Wild boys always, wild boys
[06:51.95]
